title: ZOL ReceiptJournal Receipt Record
description: JSON Schema for a ZOL ReceiptJournal receipt record. DRAFT — Fleet Standard v0.1. Every consequential action must produce one of these records. The sha256 field is an integrity hash, NOT a secret — do not redact it.

receiptId.description: Unique receipt identifier. Format: UUID v4 or 'rcpt-<sha256-prefix>'. NOT a secret.

loopId.description: The DreamLoop ID or loop session name that produced this action (e.g., 'bootstrap-agent-state-v1').

runId.description: Unique identifier for the execution run that produced this receipt. Format: UUID v4.

agentId.description: Agent identity (e.g., 'zolbot'). Never a private key or token.

action.description: Action string from the authority matrix (e.g., 'farcaster.reply', 'receipt.local.write').

status.description: Outcome of the action at the time this receipt was written.

sha256.description: SHA-256 hash of this receipt's canonical content (sha256:<64-hex>). Computed over all fields except this one. NOT a secret — an integrity check value. The value 'sha256:[REDACTED]' is INVALID and must be rejected.

previousReceiptId.description: Receipt ID of the preceding receipt in the chain, or null for the genesis receipt of a run.

previousReceiptHash.description: SHA-256 hash of the previous receipt record, or null for genesis. Used for chain verification. NOT a secret.

evidence.description: Structured evidence for this action. Must NOT contain raw prompt text, LLM completions, memory entries, or secret values. Contains only hashes, counts, status labels, and metadata.

directive.description: Directive file path or version hash.

inputs_digest.description: SHA-256 of normalized inputs. NOT a secret.

outputs_digest.description: SHA-256 of normalized outputs. NOT a secret.

approval.description: ApprovalBridge capability ID that authorized this action, or null if approval was not required.

model_calls.description: Categorical summary of model calls. No prompt text or completions.

tool_calls.description: Categorical summary of tool calls. No raw inputs/outputs.

taskId.description: Associated WorkRouter task packet ID. Optional but recommended for consequential actions.

attemptId.description: Task attempt identifier (for lease binding). Must match the task lease's attemptId.

fencingEpoch.description: Supervisor fencing epoch at the time this action was taken. Used to detect stale-epoch actions.

approvalId.description: ApprovalBridge capability ID that was consumed to authorize this action.

actorDigest.description: SHA-256 of the normalized actor identity. NOT a secret.

actionDigest.description: SHA-256 of the normalized action string + inputs. NOT a secret.
